doc_title_en: Notice regarding determination of matters relating to acquisition of treasury stock (acquisition of treasury stock under Article 165, paragraph 2 of the Companies Act based on articles of incorporation)

key_facts.reason_jp: 経営環境の変化に対応した機動的な資本政策の遂行および株主還元策の一環

summary_en: ¥2.0B upper limit, 1.30M shares (3.17% of outstanding), execution period 2026-05-15 to 2027-04-30, open-market acquisition of common stock.
summary_jp: 上限20億円、130万株（発行済3.17%）、2026年5月15日～2027年4月30日、普通株式の市場買付。
tag_en: Buyback - 1.30M shares (3.17% S/O) - ¥2.0B - open market - May 2026–Apr 2027
